title: Juja Farm Mwireri
shortDescription: Prime residential plots in Juja Farm with ready title deeds and easy road access.
longDescription:
Juja Farm Mwireri sits 2 km from Juja town, along a tarmac access road with murram finishing to the plots. The land is surveyed, titles are ready, and you can begin construction the day you sign.

This area is growing fast. New estates, schools, and shopping centres are coming up within 3 km. Water from the county supply is reachable and electricity poles are already in.

We offer flexible payment plans. Pay a 30% deposit and spread the balance over 6 months. Site visits are free every weekend.

images.alt: Aerial view of Juja Farm Mwireri plots with green surroundings
Tarmac access road leading to Juja Farm Mwireri plots
Corner plot at Juja Farm Mwireri showing survey beacons

title: Juja Farm Athi
location: Juja Farm Athi River, Kiambu County
shortDescription: Affordable plots along the Athi corridor with full infrastructure and all amenities nearby.
longDescription:
Juja Farm Athi is positioned along the Nairobi-Thika corridor, giving you fast access to Nairobi's eastern suburbs, JKIA, and the Athi River industrial zone. Commuting is simple from here.

The plots are flat, well-drained, and surrounded by established estates. All utilities are at the plot boundary. The area has active construction, meaning your investment grows from day one.

Title deeds are ready. We handle the transfer process from agreement to handover, no extra costs.

images.alt: Open plots at Juja Farm Athi with flat terrain and clear sky
Electricity and water infrastructure at Juja Farm Athi plots
Established neighbourhood surrounding the Juja Farm Athi development

title: Mwalimu Farm
shortDescription: Serene residential plots in Mwalimu Farm with title deeds ready and investor-friendly pricing.
longDescription:
Mwalimu Farm is one of Juja's most established residential schemes. The scheme has a long history of successful sales and happy homeowners. Roads, lighting, and drainage are all in place.

Plots here hold their value. The proximity to Jomo Kenyatta University (JKIA is 25 minutes away) keeps demand high from academics, students, and young professionals. Rental yields in this area are attractive.

Payment plans are available. Visit the site on any Saturday and speak directly with our team on the ground.

images.alt: Mwalimu Farm residential plots with paved internal roads
Internal road network at Mwalimu Farm scheme
Aerial view of Mwalimu Farm showing proximity to university and amenities

title: Makuyu Mananja
shortDescription: Budget-friendly plots in Makuyu with fertile land, clean air, and title deeds ready to transfer.
longDescription:
Makuyu Mananja gives you more land for less money than Nairobi outskirts. The area is known for agricultural productivity and a clean, quiet environment. It is 90 minutes from Nairobi on the Thika-Makuyu road.

These are legitimate titled plots. Documents are verified by a licensed advocate before any payment is made. No middlemen, no complication.

Makuyu is growing with new infrastructure from the county. It is a smart long-term bet and a great option for those who want space to farm or build a home away from the city.

images.alt: Green fertile land at Makuyu Mananja with expansive views
Survey beacons marking plot boundaries at Makuyu Mananja
All-weather access road at Makuyu Mananja development

title: Gongoni Malindi
shortDescription: Coastal plots in Gongoni Malindi with title deeds ready, near the beach and tourist corridor.
longDescription:
Gongoni sits 12 km south of Malindi town, in the heart of Kenya's fastest-growing coastal real estate corridor. Plots here are being bought by both locals and diaspora investors for vacation homes, Airbnb developments, and long-term investment.

The Indian Ocean is 3 km from these plots. The area is served by a tarmac road, Malindi Airport is 20 minutes away, and Watamu is a short drive south. Coastal hospitality infrastructure is booming around you.

Title deeds are clean and ready. We can facilitate virtual site visits via video call for diaspora buyers. Bank financing is available through our partner institutions.

images.alt: Coastal plots at Gongoni Malindi with ocean visible in background
Scenic coastal view from Gongoni Malindi plots
Malindi town centre showing proximity to the Gongoni development

title: Ruai Corridor
shortDescription: Strategic plots in the Ruai corridor with road frontage and title deeds, minutes from Nairobi CBD.
longDescription:
The Ruai corridor is one of Nairobi's last affordable frontiers. These plots sit along the Eastern Bypass access roads, giving residents fast connectivity to the CBD, Kasarani, and JKIA. The area is transitioning from sparse residential to a full urban zone.

Plots come with survey documents and ready title deeds. Electricity and water are both connected along the road. Matatu routes pass the access road every 15 minutes.

With the Eastern Bypass upgrades underway, prices here will not stay at this level. This is the time to buy.

images.alt: Ruai Corridor plots with Eastern Bypass visible in the distance
Road frontage plots at the Ruai Corridor development
Power lines and water pipes installed along the Ruai Corridor access road
